title: Always young
question: 把今天课文里“真实的人”和“扮演的角色”放进 school play 或 short video 的小场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: In real life, I am a student. In the play, I appear as a detective. I have to wear a dark coat. I have to speak quietly and carefully. I am not really a detective, but I play one.
word_bank: I am not really a detective, but I play one

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 角色身份：真实生活里你是学生，但在 school play 里你要扮演侦探
options.english_template: In the play, I appear as a ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 角色服装：为了让观众相信角色，你必须穿一件侦探风格的衣服

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 角色对比：你不是真的侦探，只是在扮演这个角色
options.expected_phrase: I am not really a detective, but I play one
